rules: This file is metadata only and does not create CAD geometry, wall cuts, frames, glass or materials.
Only source material slots from building_material_source_contract/material_assignment_preflight may be linked.
Missing glass, flyscreen, screen and accessory material slots are recorded as missing source-bound material slots, not invented.
Render material assignment remains blocked until exact CAD-bound component meshes exist.
Stable object names and custom properties must be preserved in Blender/Twinmotion/Unreal handoff.
